mapper.select: SELECT month_group AS month, COUNT(*) AS totalRentals, SUM(CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalReturns, SUM(CASE WHEN rental_status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = month_group) AS newMembers, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS activeMembers FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.rental_date, '%Y-%m') AS month_group, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.user_id FROM rental r WHERE r.rental_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) AS rental_data GROUP BY month_group ORDER BY month_group DESC

SELECT b.book_id AS bookId, b.title, b.author, c.category_name AS categoryName, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rentalCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_copy bc2 WHERE bc2.book_id = b.book_id AND bc2.status = 'AVAILABLE') AS currentAvailable FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN rental r ON bc.copy_id = r.copy_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, c.category_name ORDER BY rentalCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, COUNT(DISTINCT b.book_id) AS bookCount, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rentalCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT b.book_id) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(r.rental_id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT b.book_id), 2) ELSE 0 END AS rentalRate FROM categories c LEFT JOIN book b ON c.category_id = b.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN rental r ON bc.copy_id = r.copy_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY rentalCount DESC
